case_title: FLORES CYNTHIA Z. VS CALIFORNIA STATE AUTO ASSOCIATION (AAA)CO. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FLORES CYNTHIA Z. AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTO ASSOCIATION (AAA)CO. TOY, DORIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
DORIS TOY AGREES TO BE NAMED AS A DEFT. AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. CALIFORNIA STATE AUTO ASSN. IS AN IMPROPERLY NAMED DEFT. & IS DISMISSED W/ PREJUD
CERTIFIED MAIL TO CSAA RETURNED SIGNED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES CYNTHIA Z. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOY, DORIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
